compiled_state.title: [Plugin]: 30 SKILL.md files have null allowed-tools -> only 3 skills load on /reload-plugins
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
Plugin reload reports '3 skills · 29 agents' when 32 skills expected. 30 SKILL.md files have allowed-tools: (null/empty) in YAML frontmatter; plugin system requires non-null value. Only 3 skills with non-empty allowed-tools (playwright-debug, ui-discover, preplanning) load correctly. Fix added allowed-tools: (empty) to 29 files but null YAML value does not satisfy plugin system classification check.

comments.body: Gate 1a: skipped — CLI_user tag present; intent-aligned assumed
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 3 (INTERMEDIATE, overridden to ESCALATED per user request). 30 SKILL.md files have empty/null allowed-tools YAML value; only 3 with non-empty values load correctly.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Agent 1 (Web Researcher) RESULT: ROOT_CAUSE=allowed-tools: (null YAML) fails loader type check expecting string or list. confidence=high. Fix: REMOVE the allowed-tools: line entirely from 29 SKILL.md files (field is optional; absence = all tools allowed). Sources: code.claude.com/docs/en/skills, GH issue #9817 (silent skill drop on bad frontmatter), official skill examples have NO allowed-tools field.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Agent 3 (Code Tracer) RESULT: Confirmed same root cause. CRITICAL TEST BUG FOUND: tests/plugin/test_skill_allowed_tools.py asserts 'allowed-tools' in frontmatter_keys (key presence only) — comment says 'empty value is acceptable' which is WRONG. Test passes green while plugin shows 3 skills. Fix: remove allowed-tools: from 29 SKILL.md files (or set non-empty value), AND fix the test assertion to check non-null value. Agent 482e-7e61 (subagent_type): working as designed per CLAUDE.md — inline fallback is the intended path.
comments.author: Test
